unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* use our own printf() functions */
/* keep this as LAST include */
/* Lookup tables for converting setopt values back to symbols */
/* For enums, values may be in any order. */
/* For bit masks, put combinations first, then single bits, */
/* and finally any "NONE" value. */
/* sentinel to mark end of list */
unit.decl_stmt: const struct NameValueUnsigned setopt_nv_CURLAUTH[] = { NV(CURLAUTH_ANY), /* combination */ NV(CURLAUTH_ANYSAFE), /* combination */ NV(CURLAUTH_BASIC), NV(CURLAUTH_DIGEST), NV(CURLAUTH_GSSNEGOTIATE), NV(CURLAUTH_NTLM), NV(CURLAUTH_DIGEST_IE), NV(CURLAUTH_NTLM_WB), NV(CURLAUTH_ONLY), NV(CURLAUTH_NONE), NVEND, };

const struct NameValue setopt_nv_CURL_SSLVERSION[] = { NV(CURL_SSLVERSION_DEFAULT), NV(CURL_SSLVERSION_TLSv1), NV(CURL_SSLVERSION_SSLv2), NV(CURL_SSLVERSION_SSLv3), NV(CURL_SSLVERSION_TLSv1_0), NV(CURL_SSLVERSION_TLSv1_1), NV(CURL_SSLVERSION_TLSv1_2), NV(CURL_SSLVERSION_TLSv1_3), NVEND, };
unit.comment: /* These options have non-zero default values. */
unit.decl_stmt: static const struct NameValue setopt_nv_CURLNONZERODEFAULTS[] = { NV1(CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, 1), NV1(CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST, 1), NV1(CURLOPT_SSL_ENABLE_NPN, 1), NV1(CURLOPT_SSL_ENABLE_ALPN, 1), NV1(CURLOPT_TCP_NODELAY, 1), NV1(CURLOPT_PROXY_SSL_VERIFYPEER, 1), NV1(CURLOPT_PROXY_SSL_VERIFYHOST, 1), NV1(CURLOPT_SOCKS5_AUTH, 1), NVEND };
unit.comment: /* Format and add code; jump to nomem on malloc error */
unit.cpp:define: #define ADD(args) do { \ ret = easysrc_add args; \ if(ret) \ goto nomem; \ } while(0)
#define ADDF(args) do { \ ret = easysrc_addf args; \ if(ret) \ goto nomem; \ } while(0)
unit.comment: /* Escape string to C string syntax. Return NULL if out of memory. * Is this correct for those wacky EBCDIC guys? */

function.name: c_escape

unit.comment: /* setopt wrapper for enum types */

function.name: tool_setopt_enum

unit.comment: /* setopt wrapper for CURLOPT_SSLVERSION */

function.name: tool_setopt_SSLVERSION

unit.comment: /* setopt wrapper for bitmasks */

function.name: tool_setopt_bitmask

unit.comment: /* Generate code for a struct curl_slist. */

function.name: libcurl_generate_slist

unit.function_decl: static CURLcode libcurl_generate_mime(CURL *curl, struct GlobalConfig *config, struct tool_mime *toolmime, int *mimeno);
unit.comment: /* Forward. */
/* Wrapper to generate source code for a mime part. */

function.name: libcurl_generate_mime_part
function.parameter_list: (CURL *curl, struct GlobalConfig *config, struct tool_mime *part, int mimeno)

unit.comment: /* Wrapper to generate source code for a mime structure. */

function.name: libcurl_generate_mime

unit.comment: /* setopt wrapper for CURLOPT_MIMEPOST */

function.name: tool_setopt_mimepost

unit.comment: /* setopt wrapper for curl_slist options */

function.name: tool_setopt_slist

unit.comment: /* generic setopt wrapper for all other options. * Some type information is encoded in the tag value. */

function.name: tool_setopt

unit.comment: /* CURL_DISABLE_LIBCURL_OPTION */
/* CURL_DISABLE_LIBCURL_OPTION */
